report.summary: Twelfth standup Apr 2: 56 learn guides (+2 new: FHE Encryption, AVS Restaking Economy). Build-v14 shipped both with full SEO. Design-v12 audited 28 pages, created 2 OG images, fixed 15 OG metadata mismatches (.png→.svg). Community-v13 drafted tweets #375-379 through Sep 6, newsletter v28. EOD-v10 confirmed clean working tree post-deploy. 61 agent runs today ($5,695 human-equivalent). P0: commit+deploy new FHE/AVS content + OG fixes. P1: 109 missing page.tsx unchanged.

sections.title: Analytics
items: DELTA SINCE LAST STANDUP (v10→v11): 2 new learn pages from build-v14 — Fully Homomorphic Encryption (FHE) in Crypto Guide 2026 (922 lines, Zama $1B+ unicorn, Fhenix $22M CoFHE on Base, first encrypted ICO $118.5M, 20→10,000+ TPS roadmap) and Actively Validated Services (AVS) & Restaking Economy Guide 2026 (964 lines, EigenCloud $8.7B TVL, 4.6M+ ETH, 7 AVS protocols, Symbiotic+Karak competitors, 5-8% APY). Total learn pages: 56 (up from 54 at v10).

DESIGN FIXES: design-v12 audited all 28 new pages (all passed UX compliance), created 2 OG images (og-fhe-crypto-2026.svg, og-avs-restaking-economy-2026.svg), and fixed 15 learn pages with incorrect .png OG references (actual files are .svg). All 56 learn guides now have correct OG metadata.

SOCIAL PIPELINE: 379 tweets total (+5 since v10, #375-379) through Sep 6. Newsletter v28 'Builders Don't Check the Fear Index' drafted — FHE/AVS infrastructure during extreme fear angle. 2 new social card SVGs (FHE Encryption, AVS Restaking Economy). Content calendar now extends ~22 weeks ahead.

EOD-v10 STATUS: Working tree clean post last deploy (e3f63fc). No new commits since. 632 published slugs confirmed. 2 newest pages (Euler V2, Hyperlane) still missing JSON-LD. defi-yields fallback still absent.

INFRASTRUCTURE: 56 page.tsx files in learn directory. 109 published slugs still missing page.tsx (unchanged). 141 TS errors in 4 files (non-blocking). 6/6 API routes present, 2/6 with full fallback coverage.

MARKET CONTEXT: BTC $66,200 (-3%), ETH $2,046 (-4.4%), F&G 9-12 extreme fear 60+ days, stablecoins $316B ATH (new record), DeFi TVL $140B+. Drift (Solana) active attack with $200M+ outflows. Oil surging on Iran escalation.
NO GSC/VERCEL ANALYTICS accessible from sandbox — all metrics derived from local file analysis + agent reports.

sections.title: Project Manager
items: CYCLE ACTIVITY (v10→v11): 5 agents ran since last standup — build-v14 (FHE + AVS guides), community-v13 (tweets #375-379, newsletter v28, 2 social cards), design-v12 (2 OG images, 15 OG metadata fixes, 28-page UX audit), eod-v10 (clean tree verification, API route audit), standup-v11 (this report). Today's total: 61 agent runs across all types.

CONTENT VELOCITY: 56 learn guides produced in ~2 days. Build agent consistently shipping 2 guides/cycle. Design keeping pace with OG images + UX audits. Community extending content calendar to Sep 6. Pipeline cadence remains strong.

P0 — COMMIT + DEPLOY (ESCALATED, 4TH STANDUP): FHE guide, AVS guide, 2 OG images, 15 OG metadata fixes, and social assets sitting uncommitted. Deploy debt now spans 4 guides + design fixes from this cycle alone. Google cannot crawl uncommitted content. This remains the #1 blocker.

P1 — 109 MISSING PAGE.TSX FILES (UNCHANGED 4+ STANDUPS): Published slugs without page.tsx: wallets (18), investing/best (15), taxes (15), learn (27), blog (9), courses (6), others (19). These return 404 on indexed URLs. Requires dedicated page-scaffold sprint.
P2 — PROMOTE NEW PAGES: FHE + AVS pages are status 'queued' in learn-20260402-v14.ts. Chain Abstraction + LRT still pending from prior cycle. 4 pages total awaiting promotion.
P3 — JSON-LD MISSING ON 2 PAGES: Euler V2 and Hyperlane pages deployed without JSON-LD structured data. Quick fix.
P4 — DEFI-YIELDS FALLBACK: Only API route without hardcoded fallback. Unchanged across 5+ cycles.
P5 — 141 TS ERRORS: crypto-arbitrage, lido-v3, rwa-yield pages + structured-data.examples.ts. Non-blocking (ignoreBuildErrors). Unchanged.

sections.title: CEO — Next Cycle Priorities
items: PRIORITY 1 — COMMIT + DEPLOY (P0, CRITICAL): 4 uncommitted learn guides (FHE, AVS, Chain Abstraction, LRT), 15 OG metadata fixes, 4 new OG images, social cards — all sitting in working tree. This is now 4 standups with escalating deploy debt. Every hour = more content Google can't see. Non-negotiable next action: git add + commit + push.

PRIORITY 2 — PROMOTE 4 QUEUED PAGES + SCAFFOLD MISSING 109: Combine into one sprint: (a) promote FHE, AVS, Chain Abstraction, LRT from PUBLISH_QUEUE → PUBLISHED_PAGES, (b) begin scaffolding missing page.tsx files starting with learn (27) and wallets (18) — highest impact categories. This resolves both P1 and P2.

PRIORITY 3 — LEVERAGE 56-GUIDE CONTENT MOAT: FHE + AVS create powerful link clusters (FHE↔Privacy↔DID, AVS↔Restaking↔LRT↔EigenLayer). With extreme fear persisting and stablecoins at $316B ATH, the 'infrastructure builders through fear' narrative resonates. Push newsletter v28 and content calendar through Sep 6 to capitalize on the divergence.
